name: Session Start
description: Start a new session with full context loading and status report

name: Session Status
description: Quick read-only project status check without full session startup

name: Log Blocker

name: Log Decision

name: Verify Work
description: Run verification protocol on completed work (story/code/production)

name: Team Builder
description: Build agent team prompts via aim-parzival-team-builder skill

name: Session Handoff
description: Create mid-session handoff document (state snapshot)

name: Session Close
description: Full session closeout with tracking updates and Qdrant save

name: Help
description: Analyze project state and recommend next steps

name: Dispatch Agent
description: Activate a BMAD agent for a specific task

name: Exit
description: Dismiss Parzival and end session

name: Init New Project
description: Initialize a new project with full Parzival oversight setup

name: Init Existing Project
description: Onboard an existing project with state detection and branch routing

name: Discovery
description: Produce a validated PRD from user requirements

name: Architecture
description: Design technical architecture and create epics with stories

name: Sprint Planning
description: Create implementation-ready sprint with story files

name: Execution
description: Implement stories via DEV agent dispatch and review cycles

name: Integration
description: Full system testing and architectural cohesion verification

name: Release
description: Compile release artifacts and verify deployment readiness

name: Maintenance
description: Triage and fix production issues with full review cycles
